title: Research & Publications
text: My work bridges causal inference, Bayesian hierarchical modeling, and privacy-preserving federated learning, particularly focusing on how to handle realistic incomplete data and longitudinal EHR data across multi-institutional cohorts.

title: Research & Publications
text: My work bridges causal inference, Bayesian hierarchical modeling, and privacy-preserving federated learning, particularly focusing on how to handle realistic incomplete data and longitudinal EHR data across multi-institutional cohorts.

title: Research & Publications
text:

Winner of the 2026 ICSA Student Paper Award

title: Teaching Experience
text: Beyond methodological research, I am committed to statistics and biostatistics education, eventually bridging complex statistical theory with practical, computational implementation.
